title: Elytra+
description: Mod for better fly by Elytra. With some features.
body:
# 🦅 Elytra+ — The Flight Performance Mod

Master the skies with precision instrumentation and cinematic visuals. **Elytra+** combines advanced flight telemetry with high-end aesthetic enhancements to make every glide a masterpiece.

---

## 📊 Advanced Flight Instrumentation
Stay ahead of the wind with real-time data overlaid directly on your screen.

### ✈️ Integrated Flight HUD
Never lose track of your vitals. A clean, minimal overlay provides critical telemetry without cluttering your view.
*   **Real-time Velocity**: Track your speed in km/h for perfect maneuver timing.
*   **Altitude Tracking**: Know exactly how much air you have to spare.
*   **Durability Monitor**: Live status of your elytra to prevent unexpected falls.

![Flight HUD Demo](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1471741358728548375/1474433417985917143/2026-02-20_16.40.21.jpg?ex=6999d4a0&is=69988320&hm=109ca0a82c1be5fc33b1899eded54bd35a38783fac0bb76bb1c51b5c9a1f83a5&=&format=webp&width=2106&height=1368)

---

## 🎭 Cinematic Immersion
Experience flight like never before with physics-based camera effects.

### 🎥 Smooth Camera Roll
Feel the gravity. Elytra+ adds a cinematic lean to your perspective during maneuvers.
*   **Dynamic Banking**: The camera tilts up to ±15° when turning, following your flight path.
*   **Silky Smoothing**: Frame-rate independent interpolation ensures the roll is perfectly fluid, even at high speeds.
*   **Realistic Inertia**: Fine-tuned sensitivity for a "heavy" and realistic aeronautical feel.

### 🛰️ FOV Lock
Stability is key.
*   **Anti-Zoom**: Automatically suppresses the jarring FOV shifts caused by rocket boosts and extreme speeds.
*   **Visual Focus**: Maintain a consistent view of your surroundings during high-intensity maneuvers.

---

## 🤖 Intelligent Flight Assists
Automation that keeps you airborne and safe.

### 🚀 Cruise Control
Maintain your momentum effortlessly.
*   **Auto-Propulsion**: Automatically fires fireworks when your speed or altitude drops below critical levels.
*   **Toggleable**: Instantly enable or disable cruise control mid-flight with a single keybind ([C]).

### ⚠️ Impact Predictor (BRACE!)
Information is life.
*   **Visual Alert**: Flashes a "BRACE!" warning when a lethal collision is imminent.
*   **Proactive Safety**: Detects walls and terrain in your path before it's too late.

---

## ⚙️ Premium Configuration
Complete control at your fingertips, wrapped in a state-of-the-art interface.

### 🍱 Modern UI Design
*   **Rounded Aesthetics**: A stunning, premium interface with rounded corners and glassmorphism elements.
*   **Tabbed Navigation**: Categorized settings (HUD, Camera, Assists) for instant access.
*   **Standalone**: No external dependencies—works perfectly right out of the box.
*   **Instant Access**: Press **Right Shift** (default) to open the configuration menu anywhere.

![Configuration Menu](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1471741358728548375/1474433418887561318/2026-02-20_16.41.08.jpg?ex=6999d4a0&is=69988320&hm=8898109c1aae3ef3412f0d7e8266ae844238dd2fe1370123061d78486e97fdef&=&format=webp&width=2106&height=1368)

---

*Fly higher, fly smarter.*
